classes.label: Conference
classes.description: A conference event with temporal and spatial properties

classes.label: Organization
classes.description: A formal organization entity with type, contact information, and hierarchical relationships.

data_properties.label: has conference name
data_properties.description: The name or title of the conference

data_properties.label: has conference URI
data_properties.description: A URI reference to the conference resource

data_properties.label: has conference date
data_properties.description: The date of the conference as a string representation

data_properties.label: has conference location
data_properties.description: The location or venue of the conference

data_properties.label: has conference datum
data_properties.description: The timestamp of the conference event

data_properties.label: has organization type
data_properties.description: The type or category of the organization.

data_properties.label: has organization name
data_properties.description: The official name of the organization.

data_properties.label: has organization address
data_properties.description: The street address of the organization.

data_properties.label: has organization location
data_properties.description: The city or locality where the organization is located.

data_properties.label: has organization postcode
data_properties.description: The postal code of the organization.

data_properties.label: has organization country
data_properties.description: The country where the organization is located.

data_properties.label: has organization URI
data_properties.description: A URI identifier for the organization.

data_properties.label: has organization homepage
data_properties.description: The homepage URL of the organization.

object_properties.label: belongs to organization
object_properties.description: Hierarchical relationship indicating that this organization belongs to or is part of another organization.

class_mappings.description: Maps each row in conferences table to a Conference instance. No row-selection condition identified; all rows represent valid conference entities.
Maps each row in organizations table to an Organization instance. Identity based on OrgID primary key. No row-selection condition applied; all rows represent valid organizations.

{'issue_type': 'semantic_distinction_ambiguity', 'related_table': 'conferences', 'related_columns': ['date', 'datum'], 'description': 'Relationship between Date (varchar) and Datum (timestamp) columns unclear.
